skills.name: Morning Briefing
skills.description: Generates a daily news briefing that searches for the latest news on Venezuela politics, AI developments, and ICE activity, plus an email summary with priority triage and draft replies for urgent items.

skills.name: Research Assistant
skills.description: Produces comprehensive, well-sourced research documents with real data from the web. Searches multiple sources, reads actual pages, cross-references claims, and writes a structured research brief with citations.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.label: Research Topic
parameters.placeholder: What do you want to research?

skills.name: Daily Note
skills.description: Log activities, manage projects, and track tasks in your Obsidian vault. Records what you did, logs progress, updates projects, creates new projects, adds or completes tasks.

parameters.name: note_content
parameters.label: Note Content
parameters.placeholder: What would you like to log?

skills.name: Campamento Prompt
skills.description: Interactive prompt builder using the Campamento framework (Role, Goal, Context, Examples, Action, Format, Tone). Walks through each item one at a time and assembles the final optimized prompt.

parameters.name: prompt_goal
parameters.label: What is the goal of your prompt?
parameters.placeholder: Describe what you want the AI to do

skills.name: Image Editor
skills.description: Edit, resize, or remove the background from any image. Supports background swap, color changes, object removal/addition, style transfer, and lighting adjustments via Gemini AI.

parameters.name: edit_instruction
parameters.label: Edit Instruction
parameters.placeholder: What changes should be made to the image?

skills.name: Frontend Design
skills.description: Creates distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use for web components, pages, artifacts, dashboards, React components, or HTML/CSS layouts.

parameters.name: description
parameters.label: What do you want to build?
parameters.placeholder: Describe the UI you want to create
